---
title: "ggsql Demo"
format: html
jupyter: ggsql
---

## Scatter Plot

```{ggsql}
VISUALIZE bill_len AS x, bill_dep AS y FROM ggsql:penguins
DRAW point
```

## Color by Species

```{ggsql}
VISUALIZE bill_len AS x, bill_dep AS y, species AS color FROM ggsql:penguins
DRAW point
LABEL title => 'Bill Dimensions by Species', x => 'Bill Length (mm)', y => 'Bill Depth (mm)'
```

## Faceted by Island

```{ggsql}
VISUALIZE bill_len AS x, bill_dep AS y, species AS color FROM ggsql:penguins
DRAW point
FACET island
LABEL title => 'Bill Dimensions by Island'
```
